item.title: Building a DIY Water Filter System for Stray Cats Our stray cats were drinking from a filthy ditch - full of bugs and stagnant rainwater. So we built them a natural, multi-stage water filtration system using clay pots, volcanic rock, sponges, and a solar-

item.title: I can’t count the amount of times a dog begins barking at my leash trained cat, and the dog’s owner gives me the nastiest glare like it’s my fault that their dog wants to hurt my cat. Cats deserve to safely enjoy public spaces just as much as dogs. Huski
item.description: By @louiethelilacragdoll: I can’t count the amount of times a dog begins barking at my leash trained cat, and the dog’s owner gives me the nastiest glare like it’s my fault that their dog wants to hurt my cat. Cats deserve to safely enjoy public spaces just as much as dogs. Huski

item.title: Lieutenant Dani had her splints removed today and as you can see… it’s going to take some getting used to. But nothing gets in this girl’s way and she will adapt to whatever challenges she meets. #kitten #cat #manxsyndrome #catsoftiktok #cats
item.description: By @soccercatmom: Lieutenant Dani had her splints removed today and as you can see… it’s going to take some getting used to. But nothing gets in this girl’s way and she will adapt to whatever challenges she meets. #kitten #cat #manxsyndrome #catsoftiktok #cats

item.title: I’m convinced my boy cat can tolerate anything lol I love him. My girl cat is so extra, why she gotta do all that 😭 #cattok #catsoftiktok #catlover #petlover #PetsOfTikTok

item.title: Day 51: are Willie & Nibley actually tolerating each other? I’ll let you guys be the judge of that #catdad #catlife #catsoftiktok #desensitizing #funnycats

item.title: This is Orion. We adopted him and his brother (from another mother) at a cat cafe. They lived together for a whole year through multiple shelters and a foster home! He only had 3 teeth when we got him but that’s never stopped him from being himself. Despi
item.description: By @catbrothersfromothers: This is Orion. We adopted him and his brother (from another mother) at a cat cafe. They lived together for a whole year through multiple shelters and a foster home! He only had 3 teeth when we got him but that’s never stopped him from being himself. Despi
